description_long: This guard rail consists of a tubular metal frame with a simple, utilitarian design, featuring two vertical posts supporting a horizontal rail. The rail is bent at the ends to form a rounded rectangular shape, providing a continuous barrier. The structure is painted in a bright yellow color, which enhances its visibility and serves as a warning or protective barrier in urban environments. The metal construction suggests durability and resistance to impact, suitable for use along sidewalks, parking lots, or near pedestrian crossings. The ends of the rail are smoothly curved, minimizing sharp edges and potential hazards. The overall design is functional, prioritizing safety and clear demarcation of restricted or protected areas.
description: A yellow tubular metal guard rail with rounded corners and two vertical support posts, designed for safety and visibility in urban settings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full length of the yellow guard rail with its rounded rectangular shape and two vertical posts.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the narrow profile of the guard rail, showing the alignment of the posts and the continuous curve of the rail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the guard rail, emphasizing the smooth, unbroken tubular frame and the attachment points of the posts.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, again showing the slim profile and the curvature of the rail ends.
